artifact_refs.description: Worksheet that records the plain-English shortlist first and the late bank-id mapping second.
Consulted scratch notebook used to inspect dtypes, missingness, and customer aggregation ideas before late bank-id mapping.
Script version of the consulted scratch notebook.
Audit-ready mapping from each selected bank action to scratch-notebook sections and worksheet alignment.
Run-level provenance for the manual AMEX baseline.

notes: Manual AMEX TC1 baseline. The selection keeps the customer aggregation scaffold plus categorical and missingness handling, while leaving recency deltas and final cleanup out of the baseline.
